title: Sam Altman’s project World looks to scale its human verification empire. First stop: Tinder.
summary: World, the facial-scanning verification platform co-founded by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, is expanding its partnership ecosystem with Tinder and other services to provide biometric identity verification. The company's orb-based system requires physical visitation for facial scanning. This expansion represents a significant scaling of World's ambitions in the identity verification market.
content: World, which has raised eyebrows (but also a lot of interest) with its Orb-centered anonymous verification project, is looking to expand its influence via a bevy of new partnerships.

zh.title: Sam Altman的World项目寻求扩展人类身份验证帝国，首站：Tinder
zh.summary: World是由OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman共同创办的面部扫描验证平台，正在扩展与Tinder和其他服务的合作生态系统，以提供生物识别身份验证。该公司的眼球扫描系统需要用户亲身访问进行面部扫描。这一扩展代表了World在身份验证市场的雄心显著扩大。

title: US-sanctioned currency exchange says $15 million heist done by "unfriendly states"
summary: Grinex, a US-regulated cryptocurrency exchange, attributed a $15 million security breach to state-sponsored actors, claiming the hacking resources required were available exclusively to hostile nations. The claim suggests sophisticated nation-state level cyber capabilities were used in the attack. The incident highlights the vulnerability of regulated crypto platforms to advanced threats.
content: Grinex says needed hacking resources "available exclusively to ... unfriendly states."

zh.title: 美国监管的加密货币交易所声称1500万美元盗窃由"敌对国家"所为
zh.summary: 美国监管的加密货币交易所Grinex将一起1500万美元的安全漏洞归咎于国家赞助的黑客，声称所需的黑客资源仅对敌对国家可用。这一声称表明攻击中使用了复杂的国家级网络能力。这起事件突显了受监管的加密平台面临高级威胁的脆弱性。

title: OpenAI’s former Sora boss is leaving
summary: Bill Peebles, leader of OpenAI's Sora video generation team, has resigned as OpenAI discontinues the Sora project. The departure signals OpenAI's strategic pivot away from consumer-focused moonshot projects toward enterprise AI and coding applications. Peebles thanked leadership for fostering research independence during his tenure.
content:
Last month, OpenAI gave up on its Sora video generation tool, and on Friday, the Sora team's leader, Bill Peebles, announced that he is leaving the company. OpenAI has been shifting its priorities as part of an effort to avoid "side quests," and Peebles' departure is just one of many recent changes as the company moves to focus more on coding and enterprise use.
As part of a note Peebles posted on X, he said:
I am immensely grateful to Sam, Mark, Aditya and Jakub for fostering a research environment that allowed us to pursue ideas off-the-beaten path from the company's mainline roadmap. It's tempting in life to mode collapse to the most i …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI的Sora负责人离职
zh.summary: OpenAI Sora视频生成团队的负责人比尔·皮布斯已辞职，原因是OpenAI正在停止Sora项目。这一离职表明OpenAI正在从消费者导向的登月项目向企业AI和编码应用程序的战略转变。皮布斯感谢领导层在其任期内对研究独立性的培养。

title: Should you stare into Sam Altman’s orb before your next date?
summary: Tinder is expanding its partnership with World's biometric verification orbs, offering users five free boosts for verifying their identity through facial scanning. The service, initially piloted in Japan, is expanding to select markets including the US as a measure to prevent bot and AI agent impersonation. Users must physically visit a World orb to complete verification.
content:
Tinder users who prove they're a real person by visiting an identity-verifying orb will soon be able to get five free boosts in the app - and it's just the latest service to embrace the orb. World, which was co-founded by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, initially tested Tinder verification using its facial scanning orbs through a pilot program in Japan last year. It's now expanding the service to "select markets, including Japan and the United States." 
To verify that they're not a bot or an AI agent, users have to physically visit one of World's orbs in person. According to World, the orb "takes pictures of your face and eyes, then encrypts and sto …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 在下一次约会前，你应该盯着山姆·奥特曼的球体吗？
zh.summary: Tinder正在扩展与World生物识别验证球体的合作，为用户提供五次免费提升以通过面部扫描验证身份。该服务最初在日本试点，现正扩展到包括美国在内的精选市场，作为防止机器人和AI代理冒充的措施。用户必须实际访问World球体才能完成验证。

title: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles exit OpenAI as company continues to shed ‘side quests’
summary: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles are departing OpenAI as the company shuts down its Sora video generation project and dissolves its science team. The exits reflect OpenAI's strategic realignment away from consumer-focused projects toward enterprise AI solutions. This marks another phase in OpenAI's prioritization shift toward practical, revenue-generating applications.
content: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles are leaving OpenAI as the company shuts down Sora and folds its science team, signaling a sharp pivot away from consumer moonshots toward enterprise AI.

zh.title: Kevin Weil和Bill Peebles离职OpenAI，公司继续关闭"附加任务"
zh.summary: Kevin Weil和Bill Peebles正在离职OpenAI，因为公司关闭了其Sora视频生成项目并解散了科学团队。这些离职反映了OpenAI从消费者为中心的项目向企业AI解决方案的战略调整。这标志着OpenAI优先级转向实际的、创收应用的又一个阶段。

title: Man who hacked US Supreme Court filing system sentenced to probation
summary: Nicholas Moore was sentenced to probation after hacking into three US government networks using stolen credentials and publicly posting victims' personal data on Instagram. His brazen behavior included using the social media handle @ihackedthegovernment to publicize his breaches. The case underscores vulnerabilities in critical government systems and serious consequences of such attacks.
content: Nicholas Moore hacked into three U.S. government networks using stolen credentials, and then bragged about it and posted victims' personal data on Instagram under the handle @ihackedthegovernment.

zh.title: 黑客美国最高法院文件系统的男子被判缓刑
zh.summary: Nicholas Moore在使用被盗凭证入侵三个美国政府网络并在Instagram上公开发布受害者个人数据后被判缓刑。他的大胆行为包括使用社交媒体账号@ihackedthegovernment来宣传他的入侵。该案件突出了关键政府系统的漏洞和此类攻击的严重后果。

title: Anthropic’s new cybersecurity model could get it back in the government’s good graces
summary: Anthropic is potentially reconciling with the Trump administration after refusing demands to enable domestic mass surveillance and autonomous weapons capabilities. The release of Claude Mythos Preview, a cybersecurity-focused model, may improve relations with the Pentagon and government agencies. The incident highlights tensions between AI safety principles and government pressure on AI companies.
content:
The Trump administration has spent nearly two months fighting with AI company Anthropic. It's dubbed the company a "RADICAL LEFT, WOKE COMPANY" full of "Leftwing nut jobs" and a menace to national security. But some of the ice may reportedly be melting between the two, thanks to Anthropic's buzzy new cybersecurity-focused model: Claude Mythos Preview.
Anthropic's relationship with the Pentagon soured quickly in late February after the company refused to budge on two red lines: using its technology for domestic mass surveillance or lethal fully autonomous weapons with no human in the loop. Anthropic's tech has in the past been used heavily b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic的新网络安全模型可能重获政府青睐
zh.summary: Anthropic在拒绝特朗普政府关于启用国内大规模监控和自主武器的要求后，可能正在与其和解。网络安全重点的Claude Mythos Preview版本发布可能改善与五角大楼和政府机构的关系。这一事件突显了AI安全原则与政府对AI公司的压力之间的紧张关系。

title: Man with @ihackedthegovernment Instagram account tells judge, “I made a mistake"
summary: A hacker who breached US government networks and posted stolen credentials on social media under @ihackedthegovernment has been sentenced to probation. The defendant's public admission of wrongdoing underscores the brazen nature of cyber attacks against government systems. The case demonstrates both the accessibility of stolen government credentials and legal consequences for exploitation.
content: Probation for man who used stolen logins and posted private info on social media.

zh.title: @ihackedthegovernment Instagram账号持有者对法官说："我犯了个错误"
zh.summary: 一名黑客入侵美国政府网络，并在@ihackedthegovernment账户下发布被盗凭证，随后被判缓刑。被告人公开承认错误突显了针对政府系统网络攻击的嚣张性质。该案件展示了被盗政府凭证的易获取性和非法利用的法律后果。

title: Trump picks qualified, normal health leader to head CDC; experts still cautious
summary: The Trump administration selected a well-qualified health official to lead the CDC, though experts remain concerned about RFK Jr.'s anti-vaccine agenda influence on the agency's direction. The appointee brings substantive credentials to the role despite the politically contentious environment. Public health experts are watching closely to see how leadership navigates vaccine policy.
content: She's well qualified but will need to navigate RFK Jr.'s anti-vaccine agenda.

zh.title: 特朗普选择有资格的卫生领导人担任CDC主任；专家仍持谨慎态度
zh.summary: 特朗普政府选择了一位资深卫生官员领导CDC，尽管专家仍担忧RFK Jr.的反疫苗议程对该机构方向的影响。尽管处于政治有争议的环境中，该任命人选为该职位带来了实质性资历。公共卫生专家正密切关注领导层如何应对疫苗政策。

title: Sources: Cursor in talks to raise $2B+ at $50B valuation as enterprise growth surges
summary: Cursor, the AI-assisted code editor, is in advanced funding discussions to raise over $2 billion at a $50 billion valuation, with returning investors a16z and Thrive leading the round. The fundraising reflects strong enterprise adoption and growth in the AI developer tools market. Cursor's trajectory mirrors the broader venture boom in AI-powered development platforms.
content: Returning backers a16z and Thrive are expected to lead the round.

zh.title: 消息人士称：Cursor 正洽谈以 500 亿美元估值融资超 20 亿美元，企业增长飙升
zh.summary: AI 辅助代码编辑器 Cursor 正在进行融资谈判，计划以 500 亿美元估值融资超过 20 亿美元，由回归投资方 a16z 和 Thrive 领投此轮融资。此次融资反映出企业采用的强劲势头和 AI 开发者工具市场的增长。Cursor 的发展轨迹反映了 AI 驱动开发平台市场的广泛风险投资热潮。

title: ‘Tokenmaxxing’ is making developers less productive than they think
summary: A trend of "tokenmaxxing"—optimizing for maximum token usage in AI code generation—is paradoxically reducing developer productivity despite generating more code. The approach results in higher costs and increased code rewriting requirements. Developers may be conflating code volume with actual productivity gains when using AI tools.
content: There's a lot more code — but it's a lot more expensive and requires a lot more rewriting.

zh.title: 「代币最大化」正在降低开发者的实际生产力
zh.summary: 「代币最大化」的趋势（即在 AI 代码生成中优化以实现最大令牌使用）尽管生成了更多代码，但却矛盾地降低了开发者的生产力。这种方法导致成本更高和代码重写需求增加。开发者在使用 AI 工具时可能将代码数量与实际生产力收益混淆了。

title: $25,000 buys plenty of used EVs: Here are some options
summary: The $20,000-$25,000 used electric vehicle market offers compelling options for budget-conscious EV buyers seeking quality vehicles at reduced costs. This price range represents a sweet spot for secondhand EVs with solid availability and variety. The analysis highlights the growing market for affordable used electric vehicles in the US.
content: Is $20,000–$25,000 a sweet spot for secondhand electric cars? We think so.

zh.title: 2.5 万美元可以买到大量二手电动车：这里有一些选择
zh.summary: 2 万至 2.5 万美元的二手电动车市场为预算有限的买家提供了引人注目的选择，他们可以以优惠价格购买优质车辆。这个价格范围代表了二手电动车的最佳点，具有充足的可用性和多样性。分析强调了美国经济型二手电动车市场的增长。

title: Satellite and drone images reveal big delays in US data center construction
summary: Satellite and drone imagery reveals significant construction delays affecting US data center projects amid growing energy bottlenecks and rising community resistance. Data centers face challenges in securing sufficient power supply as computing capacity demand increases. The delays could impact the timeline for deploying new AI and cloud computing infrastructure.
content: Data centers face construction delays and energy bottleneck as resistance grows.

zh.title: 卫星和无人机图像显示美国数据中心建设出现重大延误
zh.summary: 卫星和无人机图像显示，在能源瓶颈和社区反对日益增加的背景下，美国数据中心项目面临重大施工延误。数据中心在确保充足电力供应方面面临挑战，因为计算能力需求不断增加。这些延误可能会影响部署新的人工智能和云计算基础设施的时间表。

title: Betting on the news raises ethical questions for journalists
summary: Prediction market exchanges like Polymarket and Kalshi are creating ethical questions for journalists as these platforms position themselves as more trustworthy alternatives to traditional media while allowing users to wager on any outcome. Newsrooms face pressure from betting odds increasingly viewed as more reliable than polls and professional reporting.
content:
Prediction market exchanges have created an environment where just about any piece of information is potentially monetizable: How well will BTS's new song perform this week? How hot will Los Angeles get? Will Donald Trump be impeached? Users can wager on all of that and, on some platforms, more gruesome and violent outcomes in the real world.
The rapid rise and expansion of Polymarket and Kalshi have put newsrooms in a strange position. Prediction market evangelists often claim that their odds are more trustworthy and accurate than polls and traditional media - effectively positioning the industry as a replacement for news. At the same time …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 对新闻进行投注为记者们带来伦理问题
zh.summary: Polymarket和Kalshi等预测市场交易所为记者们创造了伦理问题，因为这些平台将自己定位为传统媒体更值得信赖的替代品，同时允许用户对任何结果进行投注。新闻编辑室面临来自投注赔率的压力，这些赔率越来越被视为比民调和专业报道更可靠。

title: Hackers are abusing unpatched Windows security flaws to hack into organizations
summary: Hackers are actively exploiting three unpatched Windows Defender vulnerabilities after a security researcher published vulnerability details and proof-of-concept code. The real-world attacks underscore the risks of unpatched security flaws in widely-used software.
content: A security researcher published details of three security vulnerabilities in Windows Defender, and the code used to exploit them. Now, hackers are taking advantage of the vulnerabilities in real-life attacks, according to a cybersecurity firm.

zh.title: 黑客正在滥用未修补的Windows安全漏洞入侵组织
zh.summary: 在安全研究人员发布了漏洞详情和概念验证代码后，黑客正在积极利用三个未修补的Windows Defender漏洞。现实世界中的攻击凸显了广泛使用的软件中未修补安全漏洞的风险。

content: The two newest Fire Sticks block apps from outside of Amazon's store.

title: This charming gadget writes bad AI poetry
summary: The Poetry Camera is an aesthetically appealing device that generates AI poems on thermal receipt paper instead of capturing traditional photos, though the generated poetry often disappoints users despite the gadget's charming physical design.
content:
I kind of wish it just took pictures.	

I've never been as charmed and frustrated by one gadget as I have with the Poetry Camera.
It's a delightful object. White and cherry red with a color-matched woven strap, it looks playful and adorably lo-fi. If I saw it on a store shelf, I'd absolutely pick it up. 
But aside from obviously appealing, I'm not exactly sure what it is. I mean, I know what it is. It's a camera that makes AI poems instead of photos. You take a picture, and instead of printing a photo, you get an AI-generated poem inspired by the scene, printed on thermal receipt paper. But after printing dozens of poems, I can only report feeling frustrated instead of inspired.
 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这个迷人的小工具创作糟糕的人工智能诗歌
zh.summary: 诗歌相机是一款美观的设备，它在热敏收据纸上生成AI诗歌而不是拍摄传统照片，尽管生成的诗歌常常令用户失望，但这个小工具的设计很有魅力。

title: Our new favorite budget phones
summary: The Verge has reassessed its budget phone recommendations following the latest product refreshes from all major manufacturers, highlighting the iPhone 17E as the top budget option for its new MagSafe charging and A19 processor.
content:
The iPhone 17E is the best cheap iPhone, no surprises there. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

Over the last few months, every phone maker under the sun has refreshed its lineups, especially at the affordable end, with no major budget phone launches now expected until next year. That made it the perfect time to go back and reassess The Verge's recommendations for the best budget phones you can buy right now.
You won't be too surprised to hear that the iPhone 17E is now our recommendation for the best cheap iPhone, not least because it's the only cheap iPhone. Still, this year's addition of MagSafe charging makes it a much more well-rounded package than last year's 16E, and with the same A19 chip as the flagship iPhone 17, you won't f …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我们最新推荐的廉价手机
zh.summary: The Verge在所有主要制造商最新产品更新后重新评估了其廉价手机推荐，突出强调iPhone 17E因其新的MagSafe充电和A19处理器而成为最佳预算选项。

title: The best budget smartphones you can buy
summary: Budget smartphones priced at $600 or under offer increasingly capable features without flagship pricing, though users should expect trade-offs in processing power, storage, camera quality, and water resistance.
content:
Some of us take a kind of “eat to live” rather than a “live to eat” approach to gadgets. They’re tools that help you get things done, not something you want to invest a lot of time or money in. If that’s you — and there’s no judgment here from a certifiable gadget nerd — then you can probably think of more worthwhile ways to spend $1,000 than on a phone.
Budget phones to the rescue. These devices are roughly $600 or under, and they’re more capable than ever. You won’t get all the bells and whistles, but you will save a little money to spend on, I don’t know, actual bells and whistles. It’s your world.
What compromises can you expect from a budget phone? Some combination of the following: slower processors, less storage, and worse cameras than flagship phones, almost across the board. Many have lower-resolution screens, most skip wireless charging, and water resistance is often less robust than on a pricier phone.
The best cheap iPhone
Apple iPhone 17E


Score: 7

ProsCons


Now with magnets!
Healthy 256GB of storage in the base model
Capable, if basic, camera system
Basically the same processor as iPhone 17

No always-on display
Screen limited to 60Hz
No ultrawide camera or upgraded selfie cam



Where to Buy:

 $599 at Apple (256GB)
 $599.99 at Best Buy (256GB)
 $599.99 at T-Mobile (256GB)

Screen: 6.1-inch, 1170p, 60Hz OLED / Processor: A19 / Cameras: 48-megapixel f/1.6 with OIS, 12-megapixel selfie / Battery: 4,005mAh / Charging: 20W wired, 15W MagSafe wireless / Weather-resistance rating: IP68
The iPhone 17E is the minimum viable iPhone — and I mean that in a good way. It has the same speedy A19 chipset as the standard iPhone 17, starts with a decent 256GB of storage, and offers a full day of battery life. It also comes with MagSafe, unlike last year’s 16E, opening up faster magnetic wireless charging and a world of grips and accessories.
Still, there are a few big omissions in Apple’s cheapest iPhone. The most obvious is that it’s limited to a single 48-megapix

zh.title: 你能买到的最好廉价智能手机
zh.summary: 价格在600美元或以下的廉价智能手机提供日益强大的功能而无需支付旗舰级价格，尽管用户应预期在处理能力、存储空间、相机质量和防水性能方面会有权衡。

title: Dairy Queen is putting an AI chatbot in its drive-thrus
summary: Dairy Queen is widely deploying Presto's AI chatbot in its drive-thrus across the US and Canada to speed up service and encourage larger orders, following a successful test last year. The system may include assistance from human workers in offshore locations.
content:
Dairy Queen is becoming the latest fast food chain to get in on AI, as it's bringing a chatbot to dozens of its drive-thrus across the US and Canada. It aims to help speed up drive-thru service and "encourage customers to add more food to their orders," according to The Wall Street Journal.
Following a test last year, Dairy Queen is widely launching the tech built by Presto, an AI company that already works with chains like Carl's Jr., Hardee's, Taco John's, and Fazoli's. In 2023, a report from Bloomberg revealed that Presto's AI drive-thrus may actually be assisted by human workers based in locations like the Philippines.
Presto's chatbot …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 冰雪皇后在免下车餐厅部署AI聊天机器人
zh.summary: 冰雪皇后正在美国和加拿大的免下车餐厅中广泛部署Presto的AI聊天机器人，以加快服务速度并鼓励客户下更大的订单。这个系统可能包括来自海外地点的人工协助。

title: The AirPods Pro 3 are $50 off right now, nearly matching their best-ever price
summary: Apple's AirPods Pro 3 are currently discounted to $199.99 at major retailers, reaching their second-best price ever while offering premium noise cancellation and advanced features like real-time translation and conversation awareness.
content:
The latest AirPods Pro $50 off at multiple retailers, which is their second-best price to date.	

From OLED TVs to smartphones, Best Buy’s Upgrade Sale has slashed prices on all kinds of tech, including a wide range of Apple devices. We’ve rounded up the best deals from the sale here, but one of the most notable is the AirPods Pro 3, which are down to $199.99 ($50 off) at Best Buy, with Amazon and Walmart matching said price. That’s their second-best price to date and just $15 shy of their all-time low.
AirPods Pro 3

Where to Buy:

 $249.99 $199.99 at Best Buy
 $249 $199.99 at Amazon
 $249 $199.99 at Walmart

The AirPods Pro are Apple’s high-end wireless earbuds, and as such, they offer the best sound quality and most effective active noise cancellation you can get in a pair of earbuds. They’re also more versatile than prior models, thanks to a built-in heart rate sensor that works with Apple’s Fitness app to monitor calories burned across more than 50 workout types. You also get access to a number of more advanced features courtesy of Apple’s newer H2 chip, including real-time translation and conversation awareness, which automatically lowers the volume when you start speaking to someone nearby. You can even use your AirPods as a camera remote, letting you snap photos or start recording video on your iPhone with the press of a stem. 
In addition, the third-gen AirPods Pro come with a fifth ear tip size (XXS) and an IP57 rating for sweat and water resistance, making them a better fit for a wider range of users and improving durability. Their angled design helps them fit more securely in your ear, too, while subtle improvements in battery life let them last up to eight hours with active noise cancellation enabled. Unsurprisingly, they also offer clear call quality and integrate well with the rest of the Apple ecosystem, so you can easily switch between your phone and Mac or easily track your earbuds using their Find My-compatible charging case.
Read our AirPods Pro

zh.title: AirPods Pro 3现在便宜50美元，接近历史最低价格
zh.summary: 苹果AirPods Pro 3目前在主要零售商处打折至199.99美元，达到历史第二低价格，同时提供高级降噪功能和实时翻译、对话感知等先进功能。

title: Uber will now pick up your returns from your doorstep
summary: Uber is expanding its services by adding a returns pickup feature, allowing customers to schedule package pickups from their homes as part of the company's strategy to position itself as an all-in-one service platform.
content: The new returns feature is the company's latest effort to become an everything app.

zh.title: Uber现在可以从您家门口取走退货
zh.summary: 优步通过增加退货取件功能来扩展服务，让客户可以安排从家中取件包裹，这是该公司定位自己为一站式服务平台战略的一部分。

title: Anthropic launches Claude Design, a new product for creating quick visuals
summary: Anthropic introduced Claude Design, a new product enabling non-designers such as founders and product managers to quickly create visual materials. The tool aims to democratize design capabilities and reduce barriers for those without formal design training. Claude Design represents Anthropic's expansion into design-focused AI applications beyond text generation.
content: The company says Claude Design is intended to help people like founders and product managers without a design background share their ideas more easily.

zh.title: Anthropic推出Claude Design，一款用于快速创建视觉内容的新产品
zh.summary: Anthropic推出了Claude Design，这是一款使非设计师（如创始人和产品经理）能够快速创建视觉材料的新产品。该工具旨在民主化设计能力，并降低那些没有正式设计培训的人员的障碍。Claude Design代表了Anthropic在以设计为中心的人工智能应用方面的扩展，超越了文本生成。

title: With US spy laws set to expire, lawmakers are split over protecting Americans from warrantless surveillance
summary: As Section 702 spy law provisions approach expiration in April, lawmakers remain divided over surveillance reform and warrantless monitoring practices. Some lawmakers advocate for comprehensive reforms following documented surveillance abuses across multiple administrations. The expiration does not automatically terminate government surveillance powers even if the law lapses.
content: Some lawmakers are calling for widespread reforms following years of surveillance scandals and abuses across successive U.S. administrations. But even if the spy law known as Section 702 expires in April, the government's spy powers will not automatically lapse.

zh.title: 随着美国间谍法即将到期，议员们在保护美国人免受无令监视方面存在分歧
zh.summary: 随着《第702条款》间谍法的规定在四月份即将到期，议员们在监视改革和无令监视做法上仍存在分歧。在多届政府中有文件记录的监视滥用行为之后，一些议员主张进行全面改革。即使法律失效，到期也不会自动终止政府监视权力。

title: Google’s AI Mode can now help you find products in stock nearby
summary: Google's AI Mode expanded its shopping capabilities to help users locate specific products in nearby stores, moving beyond city-level price tracking. The feature leverages AI to improve product discovery and availability.
content: Although you can already track hotel prices at the city level, the new update lets you do so for a specific hotel that you're interested in.

zh.title: 谷歌AI模式现在可以帮助你在附近找到有货的产品
zh.summary: 谷歌AI模式扩展了其购物功能，帮助用户在附近商店找到特定产品，超越了城市级别的价格追踪。该功能利用AI来改进产品发现和库存可用性。

title: Ghost orchid in the machine
summary: Artist Rachel Youn creates kinetic sculptures by combining secondhand electronics with artificial flowers, producing animated installations that move and transform. The works explore themes of constraint and control through hypnotic mechanical motion.
content:
Perfect Lovers II | Photo: Nik Massey	

Vacuum cleaners, personal massagers, electronic baby rockers, and walking pads: These are the secondhand machines Rachel Youn sources to create their kinetic sculptures. Made with artificial flowers, metal hardware, and these used electronic components, each one possesses a humanlike presence. 
Slow Burn is made from an artificial orchid, a neck massager, bits of metal that clamp the orchids' petals, and a monitor mount attaching the entire apparatus to a gallery wall. A motor on the massager animates metal rods that force the orchid open and close, a visual that feels caged in its sexuality, a flower forced to furl and unfurl infinitely fo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 机器中的幽灵兰花
zh.summary: 艺术家Rachel Youn通过将二手电子产品与人造花朵结合，创作出会移动和变形的动感雕塑装置。这些作品通过迷幻的机械运动探索了约束与控制的主题。

title: Bluesky confirms DDoS attack is cause of continued app outages
summary: Bluesky identified a DDoS attack as the cause of service outages beginning April 15, exposing infrastructure vulnerabilities for the growing decentralized social platform. The incident raises questions about operational resilience amid rapid user growth.
content: Bluesky has been experiencing ongoing service disruptions since just before 3 a.m. ET on April 15.

zh.title: Bluesky 确认 DDoS 攻击导致应用持续中断
zh.summary: Bluesky 确认 DDoS 攻击是从 4 月 15 日开始的服务中断的原因，暴露了这个快速增长的去中心化社交平台的基础设施漏洞。这一事件引发了关于快速用户增长中运营恢复力的问题。

title: Netflix plans to add a vertical video feed, use AI for recommendations
summary: Netflix is launching a TikTok-style vertical video feed this month and expanding AI use for content recommendations and creation. The moves position Netflix to compete in short-form video while personalizing user experience.
content: Netflix is going to launch a TikTok-like vertical video feed within its apps this month, and plans to use AI broadly for content creation and recommendations.

zh.title: Netflix 计划添加竖屏视频源，使用 AI 提供推荐
zh.summary: Netflix 本月将推出 TikTok 风格的竖屏视频源，并扩展 AI 在内容推荐和创建中的使用。这些举措使 Netflix 能够在短视频竞争中与其他平台竞争，同时个性化用户体验。

title: Rocket Report: Starship V3 test-fired; ESA's tentative step toward crew launch
summary: SpaceX's Starship V3 completed test firing while the European Space Agency progresses toward crewed spaceflight operations. These milestones demonstrate advancing capabilities in both commercial and governmental space exploration.
content: Blue Origin will soon launch the third flight of its New Glenn rocket, this time with a reused booster.

zh.title: 火箭报告：Starship V3 试射；欧空局向载人航天发射迈出谨慎一步
zh.summary: SpaceX 的 Starship V3 完成了试射，而欧洲航天局正在向有人航天操作迈进。这些里程碑展示了商业和政府太空探索能力的进步。

title: SaySo is a new short-form video app that aims to restore users’ trust in news
summary: SaySo launches as a short-form video platform featuring exclusively verified journalists and credible creators to combat misinformation. The app addresses user frustration with AI-generated spam and unverified news flooding social feeds.
content: Users are fed up with misinformation and AI slop cluttering their feeds. SaySo is a new short-form video app that delivers news from vetted creators and journalists.

zh.title: SaySo是一个新的短视频应用，旨在恢复用户对新闻的信任
zh.summary: SaySo推出了一个短视频平台，只提供经过验证的记者和可信创作者的内容，以对抗虚假信息。该应用解决了用户对充斥社交媒体的AI生成垃圾邮件和未经验证新闻的不满。

title: Loop raises $95M to build supply chain AI that predicts disruptions
summary: Loop raised $95M in Series C funding to develop AI predicting supply chain disruptions, backed by prominent investors including Valor Capital. The investment reflects growing market demand for AI-powered supply chain optimization.
content: The San Francisco startup closed a Series C funding round led by Antonio Gracias' firm Valor, which is a major backer of xAI.

zh.title: Loop融资9500万美元，打造能预测供应链中断的AI
zh.summary: Loop在C轮融资中筹集了9500万美元，用于开发预测供应链中断的AI，得到包括Valor Capital在内的知名投资者支持。该投资反映了市场对AI驱动供应链优化的需求不断增长。

title: Are we tokenmaxxing our way to nowhere?
summary: As AI companies aggressively expand spending and rebrand across industries, critics question sustainability of the current growth trajectory. The trend widens knowledge gaps between AI insiders and the public while raising concerns about speculative hype.
content: The gap between AI insiders and everyone else is widening, and the spending, suspicion, and even new vocabulary are starting to show it. While OpenAI is busy buying up everything from finance apps to talk shows, a certain shoe company just rebranded as an AI infrastructure play, and Anthropic unveiled a model it says is too powerful to release publicly …but apparently not too […]

zh.title: 我们是否在Token最大化的道路上走向死胡同？
zh.summary: 随着AI公司在各个行业积极扩大支出并重新品牌定位，批评者质疑当前增长轨迹的可持续性。这一趋势扩大了AI业内人士和公众之间的知识差距，同时引发了对投机炒作的担忧。

title: A giant cell tower is going to space this weekend
summary: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket is scheduled to launch this weekend with a reusable first-stage booster carrying a cell tower payload, potentially breaking SpaceX's monopoly on cost-effective orbital launch vehicles. The successful test would validate reusable rocket technology critical for Amazon's satellite internet ambitions and spark intensified competition in commercial space.
content:
This weekend's scheduled Blue Origin rocket launch is rather momentous. Success would signal an end to SpaceX's monopoly on reusable orbital launch vehicles, and set up a three-way race to make that "No Service" indicator on your phone disappear forever.
On Sunday morning, Jeff Bezos' massive New Glenn rocket is scheduled to launch with the first-stage booster that launched and landed on the program's second mission last November. It's a critical test, because cost-effective booster reuse is what's made SpaceX's Falcon 9 so dominate.
Amazon desperately needs a reusable rocket of its own to accelerate its Leo launches. Without one, it's onl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 一座巨大的手机信号塔本周末将进入太空
zh.summary: 蓝色起源公司的New Glenn火箭计划于本周末发射，搭载可重复使用的一级火箭助推器和手机信号塔载荷，可能打破SpaceX在成本效益型轨道发射工具方面的垄断地位。这次成功的测试将验证对亚马逊卫星互联网至关重要的可重复使用火箭技术，并引发商业航天领域的激烈竞争。

title: Recent advances push Big Tech closer to the Q-Day danger zone
summary: As quantum computing advances accelerate, major tech companies are competing to transition their infrastructure to post-quantum cryptography to protect against future quantum-enabled decryption threats. The race reflects growing urgency to upgrade cryptographic systems before quantum computers become powerful enough to break current encryption.
content: Here's which players are winning the race to transition to post-quantum crypto.

zh.title: 最近的进展使科技巨头更接近"Q日"危险区域
zh.summary: 随着量子计算的进步加快，主要科技公司正在竞争将其基础设施升级到后量子密码学，以防止未来量子计算机带来的解密威胁。这场竞赛反映了在量子计算机变得足够强大以破解当前加密方式之前升级密码系统的紧迫性日益增加。

title: After a saga of broken promises, a European rover finally has a ride to Mars
summary: Europe's Mars rover mission has secured its fourth rocket after years of delays—SpaceX's Falcon Heavy will finally deliver the rover to the red planet. This marks the end of a prolonged saga of cancelled and rescheduled launch contracts.
content: Europe's first Mars rover mission is now on its fourth rocket: SpaceX's Falcon Heavy.

zh.title: 经过一系列破碎的承诺，欧洲火星车终于有了去火星的交通工具
zh.summary: 欧洲火星车任务在多年延误后终于确保了第四枚火箭——SpaceX的猎鹰重型火箭将最终把火星车送上红色星球。这标志着长期取消和重新安排发射合同的故事告一段落。

title: New leaders, new fund: Sequoia has raised $7B to expand its AI bets
summary: Sequoia Capital has raised $7 billion in new capital under its restructured leadership, with Alfred Lin and Pat Grady now serving as co-stewards. The fundraise represents the 54-year-old firm's first major capital raise under new management as it expands its artificial intelligence investment strategy.
content: The fundraise is the first major capital raise under Sequoia's new leadership, with Alfred Lin and Pat Grady now serving as co-stewards of the 54-year-old firm.

zh.title: 新领导，新基金：红杉资本筹集70亿美元扩大AI投资
zh.summary: 红杉资本在新的领导架构下筹集了70亿美元新资本，由Alfred Lin和Pat Grady担任共同管理人。这次融资是这家已有54年历史的公司在新管理层下的首次大规模融资，标志着其人工智能投资战略的扩展。
